ii) Orchid is example of dicot seed
iii) In maize, seed coat fused with fruit
wall
iv) Orchid is endospermic seed
A) 1 B) 2
C)3 D) 4

B) Proteinous layer

Brassicaceae (mustard) actinomorphic,
zygomorphic, bisexual, K4, superior ovary,
C2+2, C(4) (Pg. 78, E)
